diagram_title: Dialog Trigger Framework C4 Component Diagram

systems.name: OpenCode Session Runtime
systems.description: The session orchestration runtime that owns prompts, tools, planner transitions, and MCP integration.

containers.name: Session Orchestration Container
containers.description: Prompt loop and round-boundary orchestration surfaces.

containers.name: Planner And Capability Container
containers.description: Planner lifecycle and tool/MCP capability resolution surfaces.

components.name: Prompt Loop Controller
components.description: Owns turn execution, plan-mode enforcement, and continuation boundaries.

components.name: Tool Surface Resolver
components.description: Builds the per-round tool surface from registry, MCP, and managed app sources.

components.name: Planner Lifecycle Tool
components.description: Owns plan_enter, plan_exit, planner artifact validation, and root derivation.

components.name: MCP Capability Cache
components.description: Tracks MCP tool availability, dirty state, and cache invalidation for next-round rebuild.

components.name: Runtime Session Guard
components.description: Provides session runtime state and interruption/replace boundaries.

components.name: Round Processor
components.description: Executes the model round and tool-call lifecycle after tools are resolved.

relationships.description: Requests a fresh tool surface at round boundaries
Reads MCP capability state and dirty cache signals
Starts or replaces active runtime execution
Hands resolved tools and messages into the round processor
Influences planner mode transitions and execution handoff
Defines when plan/build transitions may replace runtime state
